hibernate-mapping.query: select pc.id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as pc, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as pcs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as peu, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Entitlement as pe, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as paychk where pc.id = pcs.Company.id and pc.id = peu.Company.id and pe.id = peu.Entitlement.id and pc.id = paychk.Company.id and (CASE WHEN (:isDD = TRUE) THEN paychk.DDEmployee ELSE '1' END) is not null and pcs.Service.ServiceCd in ('ViewMyPaycheck') and pcs.StatusCd = 'ActiveCurrent' and pe.EntitlementState = 'Enabled' and peu.EntitlementUnitStatus in ('Activated', 'PendingActivation', 'PendingReactivation') and pc.IsDgDisassociated = 0 and pc.IAMRealmId is not null and SUBSTR(pc.PublishStatus,7, 1) = :publishStatusWorkforce and paychk.CreatedDate > :fromDate
SELECT 1 FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company WHERE FedTaxIdEnc IN (:companyFedTaxIdEncList) AND SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd

SELECT C.SourceCompanyId FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.SMSMigration as M, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as C WHERE M.MigrationStatus = :migartionStatus AND C.Id = M.Company.Id AND C.Id not in (select Company.Id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.OnHoldReason where ExpirationDate is null)

Select comp from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as compServices, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where compServices.Company=comp and comp.FedTaxIdEnc in (:companyFedTaxIdEncList) and compServices.StatusCd='Terminated'

Select comp from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as compServices, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where compServices.Company=comp and comp.FedTaxIdEnc in (:companyFedTaxIdEncList) and (comp.SourceSystemCd=:companySrcSysCd or :companySrcSysCd is null) and compServices.StatusCd!='Terminated' and compServices.StatusCd!='Cancelled'

Select comp from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as compServices, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where compServices.Company=comp and comp.FedTaxIdEnc in (:companyFedTaxIdEncList) and (comp.SourceSystemCd=:companySrcSysCd or :companySrcSysCd is null) and compServices.StatusCd!='Terminated' and compServices.StatusCd!='Cancelled' and comp.SourceCompanyId=:companySrcCmpId

Select compServices.StatusCd from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as compServices inner join compServices.Company as comp where comp.Id=:companyId and compServices.Service.ServiceCd=:serviceCd and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN comp.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select cs from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN cs.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select cs from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and lower(COALESCE(cast(cs.Company.LegalName as java.lang.String),'')) like lower(COALESCE(cast(:legalNameWithPercentSigns as java.lang.String),'')) and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN cs.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select cs from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Company.FedTaxIdEnc in (:fedTaxIdEncList) and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN cs.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select cs from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Company.SourceCompanyId = :sourceCompanyId and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN cs.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select compEvents from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEvent as compEvents, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EventType as eventType, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.SourceSystem as sourceSystem where compEvents.Company =:company and sourceSystem.SourceSystemCd = compEvents.Company.SourceSystemCd and compEvents.EventTimeStamp >= :fromDate and compEvents.EventTimeStamp <= :toDate and compEvents.EventTypeCd = eventType.EventTypeCd and eventType in elements(sourceSystem.InterestingEventTypesSet) order by compEvents.EventTimeStamp, compEvents.CreatedDate

Select distinct comp.SourceCompanyId from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as compServices, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EntitlementUnit as eu where compServices.Company = comp and eu.Company = comp and eu.EntitlementUnitStatus in ('Activated','PendingActivation') and compServices.StatusCd != 'Cancelled' and compServices.StatusCd != 'Terminated' and compServices.Service.ServiceCd = 'DirectDeposit' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN compServices.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select compEvents from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEvent as compEvents, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EventType as eventType, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.SourceSystem as sourceSystem where compEvents.Company =:company and sourceSystem.SourceSystemCd = compEvents.Company.SourceSystemCd and compEvents.EventTypeCd = eventType.EventTypeCd and eventType in elements(sourceSystem.InterestingEventTypesSet) order by compEvents.EventTimeStamp, compEvents.CreatedDate

Select compEvents from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEvent as compEvents, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EventType as eventType, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.SourceSystem as sourceSystem where sourceSystem.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and compEvents.EventTimeStamp > :fromDate and compEvents.EventTimeStamp <= :toDate and compEvents.EventTypeCd = eventType.EventTypeCd and eventType in elements(sourceSystem.InterestingEventTypesSet) order by compEvents.EventTimeStamp, compEvents.CreatedDate

Select compEvents from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEvent as compEvents, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.EventType as eventType, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.SourceSystem as sourceSystem where compEvents.Company =:company and sourceSystem.SourceSystemCd = compEvents.Company.SourceSystemCd and compEvents.EventToken >= :fromToken and compEvents.EventTypeCd = eventType.EventTypeCd and eventType in elements(sourceSystem.InterestingEventTypesSet) order by compEvents.EventToken, compEvents.EventTimeStamp, compEvents.CreatedDate
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select fn_get_psid(:stateCode) as sourceCompanyId from dual
hibernate-mapping.query: SELECT fba FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FraudBankAccount as fba WHERE fba.AccountNumberEnc in (:accountNumberEncList) AND fba.RoutingNumber=:routingNumber AND fba.Company!=:pCompany

Select comp from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Company=comp and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and ( (comp.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and comp.ModifiedDate < :toDate) or (cs.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and cs.ModifiedDate < :toDate) or (comp.LegalAddress.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and comp.LegalAddress.ModifiedDate < :toDate ) or ( exists (from comp.OnHoldReasonSet as onHoldReason where onHoldReason.ModifiedDate >= :fromDate and onHoldReason.ModifiedDate < :toDate )) ) order by comp.CreatedDate

Select comp.SourceCompanyId from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as compServices inner join compServices.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd = 'QBDT' and compServices.Service.ServiceCd = 'DirectDeposit' and compServices.StatusCd != 'Cancelled' and compServices.StatusCd != 'Terminated' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN comp.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 order by comp.SourceCompanyId

Select comp from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN comp.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 order by comp.CreatedDate

Select cs.Company.Id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN cs.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select comp from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp where cs.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = 'Tax' and cs.ServiceStartDate is null and cs.Company=comp order by comp.CreatedDate

Select distinct tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.Company from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tx where tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= tx.Law.PaymentTemplate.SupportStartDate and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :quarterStartDate and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate <= :quarterEndDate and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:twoDaysAway and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus != 'Pending' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN tx.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 and tx.Paycheck.Company = tx.Company

Select distinct la.PayrollRun.Company from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LiabilityAdjustment as la where la.EffectiveDate >= la.Law.PaymentTemplate.SupportStartDate and la.IsReconcilingAdjustment = false and la.PayrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:twoDaysAway and la.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus != 'Pending' and la.EffectiveDate >= :quarterStartDate and la.EffectiveDate <= :quarterEndDate and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN la.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select distinct tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.Company.Id, tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tx, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.ATFPayrollsToProcess as payrollsToProcess where tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= tx.Law.PaymentTemplate.SupportStartDate and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus != 'Pending' and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.Id = payrollsToProcess.PayrollRun.Id and payrollsToProcess.ModifiedDate >=:lastRunDate and tx.Paycheck.CreatedDate>=:beginningOfTimeTax and tx.Paycheck.CreatedDate<=:runDateTime and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN tx.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 and tx.Paycheck.Company = tx.Company

Select distinct la.PayrollRun.Company.Id, la.EffectiveDate from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LiabilityAdjustment as la, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.ATFPayrollsToProcess as payrollsToProcess where la.EffectiveDate >= la.Law.PaymentTemplate.SupportStartDate and la.IsReconcilingAdjustment = false and la.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus != 'Pending' and la.PayrollRun.Id = payrollsToProcess.PayrollRun.Id and payrollsToProcess.ModifiedDate >=:lastRunDate and la.CreatedDate>=:beginningOfTimeTax and la.CreatedDate<=:runDateTime and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN la.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select distinct mmt.Company.Id, mmt.PaymentPeriodEnd from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmt where mmt.PaymentPeriodEnd <=:endDate and mmt.MoneyMovementPaymentMethod in ('EFTPS', 'EFTPSDirectDebit', 'HPDE', 'HPDERefund', 'CheckPayment', 'ACHCredit', 'ACHDebit', 'EDI', 'SuperCheck') and mmt.TaxPaymentStatus in ('AcknowledgedByAgency', 'ReturnedTaxPaid', 'RejectedByAgency', 'None') and mmt.ModifiedDate >=:lastRunDate and mmt.InitiationDate <=:runDatePlus1 and mmt.InitiationDate >=:beginningOfTimeTax and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN mmt.Company.IsDgDisassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

Select sum(tx.TaxLiabilityAmount), sum(tx.TaxableWagesAmount), tx.Law.LawId, tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate, sum(tx.TipsTaxableWageAmount), tx.Paycheck.Status from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Tax as tx where tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= tx.Law.PaymentTemplate.SupportStartDate and (tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:twoDaysAway or tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus = 'Complete') and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus != 'Pending' and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :beginDate and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate <= :endDate and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.Company = :company and tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus != 'Superseded' and tx.Paycheck.SourcePaycheckId not like '-%' and tx.Paycheck.Company = tx.Company group by tx.Law.LawId, tx.Paycheck.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate, tx.Paycheck.Status

Select sum(la.Amount), sum(la.TaxableWages), la.Law.LawId, la.EffectiveDate from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.LiabilityAdjustment as la where la.EffectiveDate >= la.Law.PaymentTemplate.SupportStartDate and la.IsReconcilingAdjustment = false and (la.PayrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:twoDaysAway or la.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus = 'Complete') and la.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus != 'Pending' and la.EffectiveDate >= :beginDate and la.EffectiveDate <= :endDate and la.PayrollRun.Company = :company and la.PayrollRun.PayrollRunStatus != 'Superseded' and not exists (select 'T' from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck as pc where pc.PayrollRun.Id = la.PayrollRun.Id and pc.SourcePaycheckId like '-%') group by la.Law.LawId, la.EffectiveDate

Select company.SourceCompanyId, comaid.AgencyTaxpayerIdEnc from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as company join company.CompanyAgencySet as companyagency join companyagency.CompanyAgencyPaymentTemplateSet capt join capt.CompanyPaymentTemplateAgencyIdSet comaid where comaid.Name = 'BEN Number'
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT distinct co.* FROM psp_company co join psp_quickbooks_info qinfo on co.company_seq=qinfo.company_fk join ( select created_date, company_fk, company_event_seq, row_number() over(partition by company_fk order by created_date desc) rn from psp_company_event where event_type_cd=:event_type_code ) ce on ce.company_fk=qinfo.company_fk and rn=1 where qinfo.process_transmissions=0 and 24 * (to_date(TO_CHAR(sys_extract_utc(fn_get_psp_timestamp),'DD/MM/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM'),'DD/MM/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM') -to_date(TO_CHAR( ce.created_date,'DD/MM/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM'),'DD/MM/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM')) BETWEEN :begin_hrs and :end_hrs and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN co.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0

SELECT distinct co.* FROM psp_company co join psp_quickbooks_info qinfo on co.company_seq=qinfo.company_fk join ( select created_date, company_fk, company_event_seq, row_number() over(partition by company_fk order by created_date desc) rn from psp_company_event where event_type_cd=:event_type_code ) ce on ce.company_fk=qinfo.company_fk and rn=1 where qinfo.process_transmissions=0 and 24 * (to_date(TO_CHAR(timezone('UTC', cast(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1) AS timestamptz)),'DD/MM/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM'),'DD/MM/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM') -to_date(TO_CHAR( ce.created_date,'DD/MM/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM'),'DD/MM/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM')) BETWEEN :begin_hrs and :end_hrs and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN co.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0

select co.source_company_id, co.fed_tax_id_enc, capt.agency_taxpayer_id_enc, co.legal_name, legal.address_line1, legal.address_line2, legal.city, legal.state, legal.zip_code, legal.zip_code_extension, admin.first_name, admin.last_name, admin.phone, cont.fax, admin.email, rate.rate, ca.company_agency_seq from psp_company co left join psp_address legal on co.legal_address_fk = legal.address_seq join psp_contact cont on cont.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_individual admin on admin.individual_seq = cont.contact_seq join psp_company_service serv on serv.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_tax_company_service_info taxinfo on taxinfo.tax_company_service_info_seq = serv.company_service_seq join psp_company_agency ca on ca.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_company_law claw on claw.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq join psp_law law on claw.law_fk = law.law_id join psp_company_law_rate rate on rate.company_law_fk = claw.company_law_seq join psp_companyagency_pmttemplate capt on capt.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq join psp_payment_template pt on capt.payment_template_fk = pt.payment_template_cd where serv.service_fk = 'Tax' and ((serv.status_cd = 'ActiveCurrent' and serv.service_start_date <= sys_extract_utc(fn_get_psp_timestamp)) or (serv.status_cd = 'Cancelled' and (taxinfo.last_quarter_to_file >= :yearQuarter))) and not exists (select 'T' from psp_on_hold_reason ohr where ohr.company_fk = co.company_seq and ohr.expiration_date is null and ohr.on_hold_reason_cd = 'AS400Hold') and cont.contact_role_cd = 'PayrollAdmin' and law.payment_template_fk = pt.payment_template_cd and pt.category = 'SUI' and pt.payment_template_cd like :state and law.law_category_code = 'UnemploymentEmployer' and rate.invalid_date is null and (rate.effective_date is null or rate.effective_date <= sys_extract_utc(fn_get_psp_timestamp)) and (claw.exemption_status is null or claw.exemption_status = 'NonExempt') and (claw.filing_status is null or claw.filing_status = 'Active') and (claw.reimbursable_status is null or claw.reimbursable_status = 'NotReimbursable') and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN co.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 order by co.source_company_id, rate.effective_date desc

select co.source_company_id, co.fed_tax_id_enc, capt.agency_taxpayer_id_enc, co.legal_name, legal.address_line1, legal.address_line2, legal.city, legal.state, legal.zip_code, legal.zip_code_extension, admin.first_name, admin.last_name, admin.phone, cont.fax, admin.email, rate.rate, ca.company_agency_seq from psp_company co left join psp_address legal on co.legal_address_fk = legal.address_seq join psp_contact cont on cont.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_individual admin on admin.individual_seq = cont.contact_seq join psp_company_service serv on serv.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_tax_company_service_info taxinfo on taxinfo.tax_company_service_info_seq = serv.company_service_seq join psp_company_agency ca on ca.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_company_law claw on claw.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq join psp_law law on claw.law_fk = law.law_id join psp_company_law_rate rate on rate.company_law_fk = claw.company_law_seq join psp_companyagency_pmttemplate capt on capt.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq join psp_payment_template pt on capt.payment_template_fk = pt.payment_template_cd where serv.service_fk = 'Tax' and ((serv.status_cd = 'ActiveCurrent' and serv.service_start_date <= timezone('UTC', cast(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1) AS timestamptz))) or (serv.status_cd = 'Cancelled' and (taxinfo.last_quarter_to_file >= cast(:yearQuarter as int)))) and not exists (select 'T' from psp_on_hold_reason ohr where ohr.company_fk = co.company_seq and ohr.expiration_date is null and ohr.on_hold_reason_cd = 'AS400Hold') and cont.contact_role_cd = 'PayrollAdmin' and law.payment_template_fk = pt.payment_template_cd and pt.category = 'SUI' and pt.payment_template_cd like :state and law.law_category_code = 'UnemploymentEmployer' and rate.invalid_date is null and (rate.effective_date is null or rate.effective_date <= timezone('UTC', cast(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1) AS timestamptz))) and (claw.exemption_status is null or claw.exemption_status = 'NonExempt') and (claw.filing_status is null or claw.filing_status = 'Active') and (claw.reimbursable_status is null or claw.reimbursable_status = 'NotReimbursable') and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN co.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 order by co.source_company_id, rate.effective_date desc

SELECT /*+ INDEX (pc PSP_COMP_IAM_REALMID_IDX) */ * FROM PSP_COMPANY pc WHERE pc.I_A_M_REALM_ID = :company_realm_id AND (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN pc.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0

SELECT /*+ INDEX (pc PSP_COMP_IAM_REALMID_IDX) */ * FROM PSP_COMPANY pc WHERE pc.I_A_M_REALM_ID = :company_realm_id AND (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN pc.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0

select co.source_company_id, co.fed_tax_id_enc, capt.agency_taxpayer_id_enc, co.legal_name, legal.address_line1, legal.address_line2, legal.city, legal.state, legal.zip_code, legal.zip_code_extension, admin.first_name, admin.last_name, admin.phone, cont.fax, admin.email, currentdf.effective_date effective_date, pf.payment_frequency_id payment_template_frequency, futuredf.effective_date future_effective_date, futurepf.payment_frequency_id future_payment_frequency, pt.payment_template_cd payment_template_frequency_cd, ca.company_agency_seq, ca.resp_start_date from psp_company co left join psp_address legal on co.legal_address_fk = legal.address_seq join psp_contact cont on cont.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_individual admin on admin.individual_seq = cont.contact_seq join psp_company_service serv on serv.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_tax_company_service_info taxinfo on taxinfo.tax_company_service_info_seq = serv.company_service_seq join psp_company_agency ca on ca.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_company_law claw on claw.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq join psp_law law on claw.law_fk = law.law_id join psp_companyagency_pmttemplate capt on capt.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq left join psp_effective_deposit_freq currentdf on currentdf.company_agency_pmt_template_fk = capt.companyagency_pmttemplate_seq left join psp_effective_deposit_freq futuredf on futuredf.company_agency_pmt_template_fk = capt.companyagency_pmttemplate_seq and futuredf.effective_date > sys_extract_utc(fn_get_psp_timestamp) join psp_payment_template pt on capt.payment_template_fk = pt.payment_template_cd and pt.payment_template_cd not like '%NOCALC' left join psp_pmt_template_frequency pf on capt.payment_template_fk=pf.payment_template_fk and ( currentdf.payment_template_frequency_fk=pf.payment_template_frequency_id ) left join psp_pmt_template_frequency futurepf on capt.payment_template_fk=pf.payment_template_fk and ( futuredf.payment_template_frequency_fk=futurepf.payment_template_frequency_id) where serv.service_fk = 'Tax' and ((serv.status_cd = 'ActiveCurrent' and serv.service_start_date <= sys_extract_utc(fn_get_psp_timestamp)) or (serv.status_cd = 'Cancelled' and (taxinfo.last_quarter_to_file >= :yearQuarter)) ) and not exists (select 'T' from psp_on_hold_reason ohr where ohr.company_fk = co.company_seq and ohr.expiration_date is null and ohr.on_hold_reason_cd = 'AS400Hold') and cont.contact_role_cd = 'PayrollAdmin' and law.payment_template_fk = pt.payment_template_cd and law.law_category_code= 'Withholding' and pt.payment_template_cd like :state and currentdf.invalid_date is null and( currentdf.effective_date is null or ( currentdf.effective_date >= ( select max(refdf.effective_date) from psp_effective_deposit_freq refdf where refdf.invalid_date is null and ( refdf.effective_date is null or refdf.effective_date <= sys_extract_utc(fn_get_psp_timestamp)) and refdf.company_agency_pmt_template_fk = capt.companyagency_pmttemplate_seq) and currentdf.effective_date <= sys_extract_utc(fn_get_psp_timestamp))) and futuredf.invalid_date is null and( futuredf.effective_date is null or futuredf.effective_date > sys_extract_utc(fn_get_psp_timestamp)) and (claw.exemption_status is null or claw.exemption_status = 'NonExempt') and (claw.filing_status is null or claw.filing_status = 'Active') and (claw.reimbursable_status is null or claw.reimbursable_status = 'NotReimbursable') and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN co.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 group by co.source_company_id, co.fed_tax_id_enc, capt.agency_taxpayer_id_enc, co.legal_name, legal.address_line1, legal.address_line2, legal.city, legal.state, legal.zip_code, legal.zip_code_extension, admin.first_name, admin.last_name, admin.phone, cont.fax, admin.email, currentdf.effective_date, pf.payment_frequency_id,futuredf.effective_date, futurepf.payment_frequency_id,pt. payment_template_cd,ca.company_agency_seq,ca.resp_start_date order by co.source_company_id , currentdf.effective_date desc,futuredf.effective_date desc,ca.company_agency_seq

select co.source_company_id, co.fed_tax_id_enc, capt.agency_taxpayer_id_enc, co.legal_name, legal.address_line1, legal.address_line2, legal.city, legal.state, legal.zip_code, legal.zip_code_extension, admin.first_name, admin.last_name, admin.phone, cont.fax, admin.email, currentdf.effective_date effective_date, pf.payment_frequency_id payment_template_frequency, futuredf.effective_date future_effective_date, futurepf.payment_frequency_id future_payment_frequency, pt.payment_template_cd payment_template_frequency_cd, ca.company_agency_seq, ca.resp_start_date from psp_company co left join psp_address legal on co.legal_address_fk = legal.address_seq join psp_contact cont on cont.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_individual admin on admin.individual_seq = cont.contact_seq join psp_company_service serv on serv.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_tax_company_service_info taxinfo on taxinfo.tax_company_service_info_seq = serv.company_service_seq join psp_company_agency ca on ca.company_fk = co.company_seq join psp_company_law claw on claw.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq join psp_law law on claw.law_fk = law.law_id join psp_companyagency_pmttemplate capt on capt.company_agency_fk = ca.company_agency_seq left join psp_effective_deposit_freq currentdf on currentdf.company_agency_pmt_template_fk = capt.companyagency_pmttemplate_seq left join psp_effective_deposit_freq futuredf on futuredf.company_agency_pmt_template_fk = capt.companyagency_pmttemplate_seq and futuredf.effective_date > timezone('UTC', cast(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1) AS timestamptz)) join psp_payment_template pt on capt.payment_template_fk = pt.payment_template_cd and pt.payment_template_cd not like '%NOCALC' left join psp_pmt_template_frequency pf on capt.payment_template_fk=pf.payment_template_fk and ( currentdf.payment_template_frequency_fk=pf.payment_template_frequency_id ) left join psp_pmt_template_frequency futurepf on capt.payment_template_fk=pf.payment_template_fk and ( futuredf.payment_template_frequency_fk=futurepf.payment_template_frequency_id) where serv.service_fk = 'Tax' and ((serv.status_cd = 'ActiveCurrent' and serv.service_start_date <= timezone('UTC', cast(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1) AS timestamptz))) or (serv.status_cd = 'Cancelled' and (taxinfo.last_quarter_to_file >= cast(:yearQuarter as int)))) and not exists (select 'T' from psp_on_hold_reason ohr where ohr.company_fk = co.company_seq and ohr.expiration_date is null and ohr.on_hold_reason_cd = 'AS400Hold') and cont.contact_role_cd = 'PayrollAdmin' and law.payment_template_fk = pt.payment_template_cd and law.law_category_code= 'Withholding' and pt.payment_template_cd like :state and currentdf.invalid_date is null and( currentdf.effective_date is null or ( currentdf.effective_date >= ( select max(refdf.effective_date) from psp_effective_deposit_freq refdf where refdf.invalid_date is null and ( refdf.effective_date is null or refdf.effective_date <= timezone('UTC', cast(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1) AS timestamptz))) and refdf.company_agency_pmt_template_fk = capt.companyagency_pmttemplate_seq) and currentdf.effective_date <= timezone('UTC', cast(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1) AS timestamptz)))) and futuredf.invalid_date is null and( futuredf.effective_date is null or futuredf.effective_date > timezone('UTC', cast(fn_get_psp_timestamp(1) AS timestamptz))) and (claw.exemption_status is null or claw.exemption_status = 'NonExempt') and (claw.filing_status is null or claw.filing_status = 'Active') and (claw.reimbursable_status is null or claw.reimbursable_status = 'NotReimbursable') and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN co.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 group by co.source_company_id, co.fed_tax_id_enc, capt.agency_taxpayer_id_enc, co.legal_name, legal.address_line1, legal.address_line2, legal.city, legal.state, legal.zip_code, legal.zip_code_extension, admin.first_name, admin.last_name, admin.phone, cont.fax, admin.email, currentdf.effective_date, pf.payment_frequency_id,futuredf.effective_date, futurepf.payment_frequency_id,pt. payment_template_cd,ca.company_agency_seq,ca.resp_start_date order by co.source_company_id , currentdf.effective_date desc,futuredf.effective_date desc,ca.company_agency_seq
hibernate-mapping.query: select pc.SourceCompanyId, cs.ServiceStartDate, pr.PaycheckDate, pr.PayrollRunDate AS PAYROLL_RUN_DATE, payc.PayPeriodBeginDate AS PAYMENT_BEGIN_DATE, payc.PayPeriodEndDate AS PAYMENT_END_DATE, cl.SourceDescription AS TAX_ITEM_DESCRIPTION,cl.SourceId AS TAX_ITEM_ID, pl.IsEmployerTax AS EMPLOYER_PAID, mmt.TaxPaymentStatus AS PAYMENT_STATUS,sum(ft.FinancialTransactionAmount) as TOTAL_AMOUNT, mmt.DueDate as PAYMENT_DATE, (case when pl.LawId in('1','61','62','63','64','65','143','196','214','215','216') THEN 'N' else 'Y' end) as IS_STATE_TAX from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction mmt, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company pc, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction ft, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Law pl, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyLaw cl, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyAgency ca, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun pr, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Paycheck payc WHERE mmt.Company= pc and ft.MoneyMovementTransaction=mmt and pl = ft.Law and pl=cl.Law and ca.Company=pc and cl.CompanyAgency=ca and ft.PayrollRun = pr and payc.PayrollRun=pr and cs.Company=pc and cs.Service='Tax' and ((payc.PayPeriodBeginDate>=:payPeriodBeginDate AND payc.PayPeriodEndDate<=:payPeriodEndDate) OR (pr.PaycheckDate >=:payPeriodBeginDate AND pr.PaycheckDate <=:payPeriodEndDate) OR (mmt.DueDate >=:payPeriodBeginDate AND mmt.DueDate <=:payPeriodEndDate)) AND mmt.PaymentTemplate is not null and pc.SourceCompanyId=:companyId group by pc.SourceCompanyId, cs.ServiceStartDate, pr.PaycheckDate, pr.PayrollRunDate, cl.SourceDescription,cl.SourceId, pl.IsEmployerTax, mmt.TaxPaymentStatus, mmt.DueDate, payc.PayPeriodBeginDate, payc.PayPeriodEndDate, (case when pl.LawId in ('1','61','62','63','64','65','143','196','214','215','216') then 'N' else 'Y' end) order by pc.SourceCompanyId, pr.PayrollRunDate desc
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: Select c.* from psp_company c inner join psp_contact con on con.company_fk=c.company_seq inner join psp_individual pi on pi.individual_seq=con.contact_seq where c.source_system_cd = :sourceSystemCode and con.contact_role_cd= :role and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN c.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 and lower(pi.first_name) = :firstName and lower(pi.last_name) = :lastName and con.social_security_number_enc in :ssnList and lower(pi.email) = :email and regexp_replace(pi.phone, '[^0-9]', '') = :phone

Select c.* from psp_company c inner join psp_contact con on con.company_fk=c.company_seq inner join psp_individual pi on pi.individual_seq=con.contact_seq where c.source_system_cd = :sourceSystemCode and con.contact_role_cd= :role and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN c.IS_DG_DISASSOCIATED ELSE 0 END) = 0 and lower(pi.first_name) = :firstName and lower(pi.last_name) = :lastName and con.social_security_number_enc in :ssnList and lower(pi.email) = :email and regexp_replace(pi.phone, '[^0-9]', '','g') = :phone
